name: ogre-execute-log
command: bash -c 'touched=(); for f in "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"/.ai/.ogre/logs/issue-*/execute-*.log; do [ -f "$f" ] && touched+=("$f"); done; while true; do for f in "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"/.ai/.ogre/logs/issue-*/execute-*.log; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; if [[ ! " ${touched[*]} " =~ " $f " ]]; then touched+=("$f"); tail -F -n +1 "$f" & fi; done; sleep 2; done'
description: Ogre execute runner output (background executor progress/errors)
